title: Raw Capture Layer + CCP Business Element Extraction

deliverables: extract_from_capture() — load from raw capture JSON

missions.title: Confidence Scoring — heuristic + LLM fallback
deliverables: score_elements() — batch scoring with LLM-only-for-medium optimization

missions.title: Situational Routing with human confirmation
deliverables: route_element() — auto-route HIGH confidence, pending for MEDIUM/LOW
route_elements() — batch routing with auto/pending split

deliverables: process_capture() — load raw capture by ID → full pipeline
confirm_element() — apply confirmation to pending element
get_pm_summary() — PM counts for Friday briefing

missions.title: PM Surface — local JSON + API
deliverables: PMStore class — CRUD for 6 JSON tabs
PMEntry dataclass — full schema with status lifecycle
get_summary() — counts per tab per status
ingest_ccp_result() — bulk intake from CCP pipeline run

missions.title: End-to-end test: paste text → CCP → elements → PM
missions.test_input: 5-sentence paragraph with TODO, BLOCKER, IDEA, decision, research question, client insight
verification_checklist: Paste text → CCP extracts elements: PASS
Each element has type, confidence, suggested destination: PASS
Auto-route HIGH confidence to PM JSON: PASS
Friday can read PM surface data: PASS
No duplicate entries from double-write: PASS

modified_files: epos/pm/__init__.py — updated to export PMStore, PMEntry, PMTab, pm_router
what_went_well: All 6 CCP/PM modules imported cleanly — no dependency issues
9 element types classify correctly with keyword heuristics (0.62-0.97 confidence)
Confidence bands correctly segregate: HIGH auto-routes, MEDIUM/LOW pending
PMStore tabs auto-initialize on first access — zero setup required
Route ordering fix (_ingest/_confirm before /{tab}) resolved FastAPI path matching
Dedup check prevents double-write when router + store both write same element
Friday.get_pm_summary() returns total_items + total_pending for briefing
Full end-to-end in one call: 7 elements extracted from 5 sentences in ~20ms
what_went_wrong: FastAPI parameterized route POST /{tab} caught /_ingest before the specific route — required reordering (specific routes before parameterized)
Heredoc in docker exec corrupted triple-quoted docstrings — fixed by using docker cp from local workspace
Route reorder script inserted ingest block inside module docstring — fixed by cp from workspace file
Double-write: router._write_element_to_pm() AND PMStore.ingest_ccp_result() both wrote to same files — fixed with dedup check in ingest_ccp_result()
CCPPipeline.get_pm_summary() was missing total_items key that PMStore.get_summary() had — patched inline in container
what_was_learned: FastAPI uses definition order for route matching within same path prefix — always put specific named routes before /{param} routes
Heredoc with 'PYEOF' in docker exec: triple-quoted strings inside the Python code corrupt the heredoc — use docker cp instead
Two-path architecture (router writes to PM files + store writes to PM files) creates duplicates — need single writer pattern
Single-writer pattern: router.route_element() should only return RoutingResult (no write), let PMStore.ingest_ccp_result() be the only writer
Dedup by element_id is necessary when both pathways can write to same tab files

before.pm_surface: exists (extraction_framework.py) but no JSON tabs or API

after.ccp_module: operational — 9 element types, heuristic + LLM scoring
after.pm_surface: 6 JSON tabs initialized, 7 API endpoints mounted on port 8001
